addSafetyNetDebt(bytes32,uint256).details: Callable only by SafetyNetPool. Does not affect balance or circleObligation.

params.shares: YieldRouter shares representing the gap covered this round

chargeFromYield(bytes32,uint256).details: Callable only by SafetyNetPool. Reverts PositionInsolvent if balance - obligation      is insufficient to cover any remainder after yield is exhausted.

creditPrincipal(bytes32,uint256).details: Callable only by the SavingsCircle contract. Semantically distinct from      `creditYield` — this is a principal transfer, not yield accrual.

emergencyWithdraw().details: Only callable when the emergency module has activated the emergency flag.

params.shieldedId: Opaque commitment derived from member address + nonce.
Opaque commitment derived from member address + nonce.

returns.position: The Position struct; all fields zero for unknown shieldedIds.

params.shieldedId: Opaque commitment derived from member address + nonce.

setCircleObligation(bytes32,uint256).details: Callable only by the SavingsCircle contract. Reverts if obligation > balance.

params.shieldedId: Opaque commitment derived from member address + nonce.

activateEmergency().notice: Activate the global emergency flag, unlocking all positions.

addSafetyNetDebt(bytes32,uint256).notice: Increase the safetyNetDebt ledger for a position.

chargeFromYield(bytes32,uint256).notice: Charge interest from a member's yield earnings, then from free balance.

clearSafetyNetDebt(bytes32).notice: Reset safetyNetDebtShares to zero at payout settlement.

computeShieldedId(address).notice: Compute the shieldedId for a given user address.

creditPrincipal(bytes32,uint256).notice: Credit a principal increase to a position (ROSCA payout mechanism).

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit USDC; funds start yielding immediately via the yield router.

emergencyWithdraw().notice: Full withdrawal in emergency state — circle obligation is released.

getCircleObligation(bytes32).notice: Returns the currently locked circle obligation for a position.

getPosition(bytes32).notice: Returns the full position for a given shielded identity.

getSafetyNetDebtShares(bytes32).notice: Returns the accumulated safety-net debt shares for a position.

getWithdrawableBalance(bytes32).notice: Returns `balance - circleObligation` for a position (safe to withdraw).

setCircleObligation(bytes32,uint256).notice: Set or update the circle obligation for a position.
